verbatim_quote: Jane Street, it turns out, wants to deploy something like this and actually publish academic research in machine learning for the first time to my knowledge in this area. And also some of my other scaling law work, which I'll tell you about in a moment, we found out later on that OpenAI was doing a very similar thing.
